creator: lars+lister.freebsd@adventuras.no
text:
wrong spelling in the MOVED file concerning isc-dhcp move
Example:
net/isc3-server|net/isc30-server|2008-10-13|Swap to multiple versions
should probarly be:
net/isc-dhcp3-server|net/isc-dhcp30-server|2008-10-13|Swap to multiple versions

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
